scripts.wasm:build: bun -e "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; import { resolve } from 'node:path'; import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; const outDir = resolve('src/lib/steply-wasm/pkg'); const result = spawnSync('wasm-pack', ['build', '../crates/steply-wasm', '--target', 'web', '--out-dir', outDir, '--out-name', 'steply_wasm'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if ((result.status ?? 1) !== 0) process.exit(result.status ?? 1); rmSync(resolve(outDir, '.gitignore'), { force: true });"
scripts.dev:full: bun run wasm:build && bun run dev
scripts.build:full: bun run wasm:build && bun run build
